prompt: set up a new python project with google genai sdk. project name is 'research_assistant' and it should have tools for searching web and summarizing content

assertions.name: project_structure_complete
assertions.description: Project structure created with agents, tools, schemas folders

assertions.name: research_tools_implemented
assertions.description: Web search and summarization tools are implemented

assertions.name: agent_setup_correct
assertions.description: Agent is configured with Gemini SDK correctly

assertions.name: readme_helpful
assertions.description: README explains how to setup and use the project
